title: Bottom row: Z X C V B
description: Left hand DOWN — bottom row drill
text: ax cab vex back zap five six box brave cave maze brand cracks branch chance basic black break

tips.text: DOWN from home — curl fingers under
Z and X are rare but still need speed

tips.target: ax cab vex back zap five six box brave

tips.text: C and V appear in everyday words

tips.target: cave maze brand cracks branch chance basic black break

character_tips.anna: Curl fingers UNDER your palm to reach down. Less awkward over time.
character_tips.maxim: Bottom row is most ergonomically awkward — drill until it's natural.
character_tips.klavochka: Bending down like picking berries, my dear 🍓
